description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Event Details

Date: Wednesday, May 13, 2026

Meeting Time: 9:45 a.m.

Meeting Place: Agano Station ticket gate

Route: Agano Station → Taira Chestnut Garden → Higashi-Agano Station → Musashi-Yokote Station (my goal: about 10 kilometers) → Koma Station

Total Distance: About 14 kilometers

Estimated Duration: About 4 hours 30 minutes

Participation Fee: 200 yen (for materials, etc.; collected on the day)

What to Bring: Lunch box, drinks, rain gear, transportation IC card, Sugo-ashi handbook (if you have one)

Application: Apply to ASA Hanno by Saturday, May 9, 2026

Phone: 042-972-4701
Fax: 042-974-2190

Cancellation Check: To confirm cancellation due to weather or other reasons, contact ASA Hanno after 3 p.m. the day before the event.

Other: Please arrange your own insurance.

Inquiries: Onda, 090-2205-8073

Organizer: Hanno Walking Club

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/kenkohukusibu/hokencenter/10588.html
summary: ℹ️ Sugo-ashi Event: Walk the Hanno Two-Day Agano Course on Wednesday, May 13, 2026
